target: 6. Merging into the Night

(His body is glowing!
The same as when Totsumura-san's shadow was born…!)

(But… right now,
there's no sign of them chasing us?)

(Maybe they can't move in this state…?
If that's the case!)
Totsumura-san, run!!
Eh!?! Oh, right!!

Hahah… What the hell was that!?
It was glowing so much!

Probably… it was creating a new shadow.
There was something similar before…

The story that Shinpei-kun told me…
It really did happen, huh…

Anyway, we need to run now!
Before it starts chasing us--
Hah, hah, hah…
Hey, Totsumura-san?

No good…
I can't run anymore…
But if we don't run, the shadow will!

I know.
But it's impossible if it's impossible…

Understood.
But if running is impossible, let's hide somewhere…
The police station… no good.

Probably…
They might have already spread out.

Also… I don't want to involve anyone,
so let's avoid places with people.

That's the opposite.
If we go to a crowded place, Mio… no, that thing
might attack us, right?
It might have been like that before.
But now the situation is different… maybe…
(When I was killed the second time… by Mio--)

(At that time, Mio didn't let her guard down,
afraid of the risk of the gunshot sound)

(That means, for Mio and her group,
our existence poses some kind of risk)
Shinpei-kun, shut up and say something!
It's hard to explain, but…

The shadow Mio was being careful
to not reveal our existence.

Yet, for some reason, it suddenly appeared
in front of us today.
So… what does that mean?

So there must be some situation
that forced them to appear in front of us.
For the shadow Mios, it's an inconvenient situation…

If that's the case,
if we're around people, it's bad!
That's exactly what I'm saying.
Anyway, get out of the town.
Yes, let's find a place to hide.

Ow… damn it!
Going into the forest at this hour,
I can't even walk properly…

The shadow's form isn't visible yet.
Let's hide while we can.

Ah.
Then, let's hide in the bushes over there…
Why… did it have to turn out like this…
Let's just focus on how to escape for now…
We can't just hide forever, you know…

You're right…
But the reinforcements from the mainland
should arrive in the morning.
Let's wait for them--
No, that's dangerous.
…Why!?

The shadow earlier… it might have copied
either you or me.

If the copy was
Totsumura-san, then…
…Then what?

If the reinforcements come,
that fake… the shadow Totsumura
might convince them to go back to the mainland…
That's crazy!

Of course, there's a chance
we might be killed before morning,
but…
What should we do then…?
(The shadow Mio knows the location of Kofune)

(But even if we have no place to go,
just hiding here…)
(At least if we had something to protect ourselves…)
Something to protect ourselves…
What are you staring at?
Totsumura-san, do you have a gun?

A gun…?
Ah, I do, but…
No! That's no good!

If I use that here,
it won't just be a report!
Totsumura-san, calm down!

If the copy was Totsumura-san,
that means the enemy has a gun too, right?

(In the previous loop, the shadow Mio borrowed
a gun from the shadow Totsumura…)

(It's safer to assume that the copied shadow
has everything the original person had)
There's no guarantee we'll escape until morning.

Moreover, even if we escape until morning,
as long as the fundamental threat remains,
the danger won't end.
The fundamental… threat?

Yes… the fundamental threat,
as long as we don't deal with that shadow,
we'll always be targeted!

If you think about it…
isn't it time to make a decision?
They don't hesitate to kill people.

(Even when killing me… 
the shadow Mio didn't change expression)
So…
We have to strike first.

Yes, there's a lot we don't know about the shadows,
but…

They might use a knife, 
and their physical abilities are probably similar to humans.

If the shadows have guns,
they'll definitely use them.
So…

If that happens,
we'll have no choice but to fight.

For survival…
and to protect the islanders.
To protect the islanders…

You're right…
I'm the hero of justice.
It's my job to protect everyone on the island.

For Erika-chan too,
I'll do it!

Let's do it!
We'll fight to protect everyone!
Yes, let's do it!
